examples: Little white Paternoster, which God made, which God said, which God placed in paradise.
Above the door of the refectory this prayer, which was called the white Paternoster, and which possessed the property of bearing people straight to paradise, was inscribed in large black letters.
The best place to stay is Paternoster, a whitewashed fishing village with blue-and-red boats on its sandy beach.
So the occupation tried to site itself outside the administrative offices for those computers, on Paternoster Square.
